mapper.select: /* getExportCard */ select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by OE.COMPKEY, OE.OERETIT) as ROWNUM , OE.COMPKEY , OE.OERETKY , concat(MO.OWADDR1, ' ', MO.OWADDR2, ' ', MO.OWADDR3) as OWADDR , MS.SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC , OE.RTODQTY , MS.SKUAT03 , OE.SUOMKEY , Fn_com_todate(OE.OEINSDT) as OEINSDT , MR.RSNCDNM , MO.OWNAMLC , fn_sy_usernam(OE.COMPKEY, OE.CREUSER) as CREUSER from OERETI OE inner join MSKUWC MS on MS.COMPKEY = OE.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = OE.WAREKEY and MS.OWNERKY = OE.OWNERKY and MS.SKUMKEY = OE.SKUMKEY inner join MRSCMA MR on MR.COMPKEY = OE.COMPKEY and MR.WAREKEY = OE.WAREKEY and MR.DOCCATE = '300' and MR.DOCTYPE IN ('330', '340') and MR.RSNCODE = OE.RSNCODE inner join MOWRMA MO on MO.COMPKEY = OE.COMPKEY and MO.OWNERKY = OE.OWNERKY where OE.OERETKY = #{oeretky} and OE.COMPKEY = #{compkey} order by OE.COMPKEY, OE.OERETIT

/* getPaymentCard */ select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT) as ROWNUM , OC.COPODKY , concat(MO.OWNAMLC, '(', WA.OWNERKY, ')') as OWNERKY , date_format(OC.REQDATE, '%Y년 %m월 %d일') as REQDATE , MD.DENAMLC , MS.SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC , WA.ASNDQTY , MS.SKUAT03 , WA.AUOMKEY , concat(CEILING(MP.PACKQTY), '/', CEILING(WA.ASNDQTY / MP.PACKQTY)) as BOXCNT , WA.ASNMEMO , ifnull(WA.EOASNKY, ' ') as EOASNKY , WA.WAREKEY , MP.TRUNTYP from WASNIF WA left outer join OCOPUR OC on OC.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and OC.COPODKY = WA.COPODKY and OC.COPODIT = WA.COPODIT inner join MSKUWC MS on MS.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY and MS.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY and MS.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY left outer join MPAKMA MP on MS.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = MP.WAREKEY and WA.TRUNTYP = MP.TRUNTYP and MS.PACKKEY = MP.PACKKEY left outer join MDESMA MD on MD.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MD.PTNRKEY = WA.CUSTKEY and MD.DESTKEY = WA.DESTKEY inner join MOWRMA MO on MO.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MO.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY where WA.EOASNKY = #{eoasnky} and WA.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and WA.ASNSTAT != 'CANCEL' order by WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT

select sum(WA.ASNDQTY) as totalAsndqty, count(OC.COPODKY) as totalColumn from WASNIF WA left outer join OCOPUR OC on OC.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and OC.COPODKY = WA.COPODKY and OC.COPODIT = WA.COPODIT where WA.EOASNKY = #{eoasnky} and WA.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and WA.ASNSTAT != 'CANCEL'
